---
title: "Vanessa Di Lego"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="hero-section">
<div class="hero-text">

# Vanessa <em>Di Lego</em>

<p class="hero-role">
Professor of Demography · Departamento de Demografia, Cedeplar/FACE/UFMG<br>
<a href="https://cedeplar.ufmg.br/pos-graduacao/demografia#professores-e-pesquisadores" style="color:#1a5276;font-size:0.8rem;">Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais</a>
</p>

<p class="lead">
I work at the intersection of formal demography, mortality methodology, and gender — asking how we measure health and longevity, and for whom the numbers hold.
My current research focuses on lifespan variability and inequality, estimation sensitivity in health expectancy, and gender gaps in mortality and morbidity.
</p>

<div class="hero-links">
<a href="https://github.com/vdilego">GitHub</a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/vanessa-di-lego-51070274/">LinkedIn</a>
<a href="https://bsky.app/profile/vdilego.bsky.social">Bluesky</a>
<a href="https://twitter.com/v_dilego">Twitter/X</a>
<a href="mailto:vdilego@cedeplar.ufmg.br">Email</a>
<a href="cv.qmd">CV</a>
</div>

</div>
<div class="hero-photo">
  <img src="photo_me.jpg" alt="Vanessa Di Lego" onerror="this.style.display='none';document.getElementById('photo-placeholder').style.display='flex';" />
  <div id="photo-placeholder" class="hero-photo-placeholder" style="display:none;">photo_me.jpg</div>
</div>
</div>

---

<span class="recent-section-label">Selected recent work</span>

<div class="pub-entry" style="border-top:1px solid #f0f0f0;">
<div>
<p class="pub-title"><a href="https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10654-025-01346-2">Why do women live longer than men, but spend more time in poor health? A decomposition analysis of the gender gap in unhealthy life years across Europe</a></p>
<p class="pub-authors">Muszyńska-Spielauer, M., Minagawa, Y., Di Giulio, P. & <strong>Di Lego, V.</strong></p>
<p class="pub-journal">European Journal of Epidemiology, 2026</p>
</div>
<span class="pub-tag">Gender</span>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
<div>
<p class="pub-title"><a href="#">Mismatches in Health: A Global Analysis of Discrepancies Between Self-Reported and Tested Mobility and Cognition</a></p>
<p class="pub-authors"><strong>Di Lego, V.</strong>, Spitzer, S. & Lazarevič, P.</p>
<p class="pub-journal">Comparative Population Studies, v. 49, 2024</p>
</div>
<span class="pub-tag">Health</span>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
<div>
<p class="pub-title"><a href="#">Uncovering the gender health data gap</a></p>
<p class="pub-authors"><strong>Di Lego, V.</strong></p>
<p class="pub-journal">Cadernos de Saúde Pública, v. 39, 2023</p>
</div>
<span class="pub-tag">Gender</span>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
<div>
<p class="pub-title"><a href="https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1201971222001977">The impact of COVID-19 vaccines on the Case Fatality Rate: The importance of monitoring breakthrough infections</a></p>
<p class="pub-authors"><strong>Di Lego, V.</strong>, Sanchez-Romero, M. & Fürnkranz-Prskawetz, A.</p>
<p class="pub-journal">International Journal of Infectious Diseases, 2022</p>
</div>
<span class="pub-tag">COVID-19</span>
</div>

<p style="margin-top:1.5rem;"><a href="publications.qmd" style="font-size:0.875rem;font-weight:500;">View all publications →</a></p>
